notes: Realistic case: a small Python service workspace with two top-level config/README files (pyproject.toml, README.md) and four subdirectories (src, tests, docs, scripts) each containing at least one file, including nested files under src/app/. The gold inventory exercises lexicographic ordering across mixed case ("README.md" sorts before "docs" by ASCII codepoint), recursive counts (src has 3 files inside src/app/), and total_files=9. Synthetic fixture; no customer data.
